name: Ewaso Ng'iro Headwaters Protection
blocking_factor: Large-scale ranch and conservancy land use upstream
notes: Headwaters on Mt Kenya NW slopes. Upper catchment dominated by ranches and conservancies with mixed land management. WRA coordination with private landholders inconsistent.

name: Nanyuki Town Drainage
blocking_factor: Budget absorption and design revision after 2019 floods
notes: Design revised after 2019 major event. Phase 1 procurement stalled. County engineering department capacity constraint.

name: Laikipia Flash Flood Early Warning
blocking_factor: Short warning window — Laikipia plateau runoff reaches town in under 2 hours
notes: 3 gauges operational. Warning achievable but barely actionable at 90 minutes. Community alert chain not established.

name: Mt Kenya NW Catchment Reforestation
blocking_factor: Private land adjacent to forest not covered
column12: 000 ha reforested in Aberdare-Mt Kenya corridor. Private land deforestation continues.
